description: Critical configurations that MUST NOT drift. Auto-heal check #12 validates each one nightly. Drift = needs-Ken US filed immediately. Update this baseline ONLY through explicit Ken-approved decision logged in decisions.md.
lastApprovalContext: CHG-0416: TRIGGER-06 baseline update — confirmed current interim-period Ollama Cloud model assignments as new baseline. Anthropic API credits depleted (CHG-0349). Platform running on deepseek-pro (main, business) + gemma4:31b-cloud (governance, defaults). Haiku models removed from config (Anthropic unavailable). All 10 drifted checks now confirmed as expected current state.
interimNote: CHG-0349 INTERIM PERIOD: All Anthropic models are unavailable. Baseline reflects Ollama Cloud Tier 2 as primary for all agents. TRIGGER-14 (CLAUDE RESTORE) will trigger re-baseline back to Anthropic when Ken re-provisions API key.

checks.name: Agent main model primary is deepseek-pro (interim — CHG-0349)
checks.rationale: CHG-0349 INTERIM: Claude API credits depleted. Main agent (Yoda) runs deepseek-pro via Ollama Cloud. Previously Sonnet. Will restore to Sonnet via TRIGGER-14 (CLAUDE RESTORE).
checks.fix_command: No fix needed — current state is expected interim config. Will be re-baselined after TRIGGER-14.

checks.name: Default primary model is gemma4:31b-cloud (interim — CHG-0349)
checks.rationale: CHG-0349 INTERIM: Default primary is gemma4:31b-cloud (Ollama Cloud Tier 2). Previously Haiku. Governs any agent without explicit override. Will restore to Haiku via TRIGGER-14.
checks.fix_command: No fix needed — current state is expected interim config. Will be re-baselined after TRIGGER-14.

checks.name: Default fallback chain includes kimi safety net (CHG-0270)
checks.rationale: CHG-0270 kimi safety net still active. Interim period has expanded fallback chain (defaults now has 2 fallbacks: deepseek-pro + kimi). Main agent: 2 fallbacks. Minimum 1 fallback (kimi) still enforced.
checks.fix_command: edit ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json: agents.defaults.model.fallbacks must include ollama/kimi-k2.6:cloud as final fallback

checks.name: Main agent fallback chain length >=2 (interim)
checks.rationale: CHG-0270 + CHG-0349: main agent fallback chain must have at least 2 levels. Currently deepseek-pro primary → gemma4:31b-cloud → kimi. Kimi is final safety net.
checks.fix_command: edit ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json: agents.list[id=main].model.fallbacks must include ollama/kimi-k2.6:cloud as final fallback

checks.name: Ollama apiKey resolved (not placeholder)
checks.rationale: Hardened on 2026-04-27 (CHG-0003) after night-2 outage. Placeholder string OLLAMA_API_KEY caused fallback failure. EVEN MORE CRITICAL during interim — Ollama Cloud is the ONLY provider.

checks.name: Ollama auth-profiles entry present
checks.rationale: Belt-and-braces with config-004. Both auth layers must declare ollama-local. Critical during interim — Ollama Cloud is the ONLY provider.
checks.fix_command: edit ~/.openclaw/agents/main/agent/auth-profiles.json: add profiles.ollama:default with provider=ollama and key=ollama-local

checks.name: Anthropic auth-profiles entry present (for future restore)
checks.rationale: CHG-0349 INTERIM: Anthropic is unavailable but auth profile should remain for TRIGGER-14 restore. If missing, CLAUDE RESTORE will fail. Downgraded from critical to warning during interim.
checks.fix_command: openclaw agents auth (Ken-only), then run scripts/propagate-anthropic-key.sh

checks.name: Workspace path consistent
checks.rationale: Drift here breaks all relative-path scripts and memory recall.

checks.name: Aria (business agent) model primary is deepseek-pro (interim — CHG-0349)
checks.rationale: CHG-0349 INTERIM: Aria (business) runs deepseek-pro via Ollama Cloud. Previously Sonnet. Will restore to Sonnet via TRIGGER-14.
checks.fix_command: No fix needed — current state is expected interim config.

checks.name: No Opus in default fallback chain
checks.rationale: CHG-0075: Aria prohibits Opus. Since fallbacks are global defaults, defaults must not include Opus.

checks.name: Shield (security agent) model primary is gemma4:31b-cloud (interim — CHG-0349)
checks.rationale: CHG-0349 INTERIM: Governance agents run gemma4:31b-cloud (T2 Ollama Cloud). Previously Haiku. Will restore to Haiku via TRIGGER-14.
checks.fix_command: No fix needed — current state is expected interim config.

checks.name: Lex (legal agent) model primary is gemma4:31b-cloud (interim — CHG-0349)
checks.rationale: CHG-0349 INTERIM: Governance agents run gemma4:31b-cloud. Previously Haiku. Will restore to Haiku via TRIGGER-14.
checks.fix_command: No fix needed — current state is expected interim config.

checks.name: Sage (qa agent) model primary is gemma4:31b-cloud (interim — CHG-0349)
checks.rationale: CHG-0349 INTERIM: Governance agents run gemma4:31b-cloud. Previously Haiku. Will restore to Haiku via TRIGGER-14.
checks.fix_command: No fix needed — current state is expected interim config.

checks.name: Warden (governance agent) model primary is gemma4:31b-cloud (interim — CHG-0349)
checks.rationale: CHG-0349 INTERIM: Warden runs gemma4:31b-cloud. Previously Haiku. Will restore to Haiku via TRIGGER-14.
checks.fix_command: No fix needed — current state is expected interim config.

checks.name: Haiku 4.5 NOT required in models (interim — Anthropic unavailable)
checks.rationale: CHG-0349 INTERIM: Anthropic models unavailable. Haiku 4.5 removed from registered models. Will be re-added via TRIGGER-14 restore. Severity downgraded from warning to info during interim.
checks.fix_command: No fix needed during interim. TRIGGER-14 will re-add anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5 to defaults.models.

checks.name: No agent has model=null in openclaw.json
checks.rationale: All agents must have explicit model config. null model = falls through to defaults which may not be appropriate for the agent's workload.
checks.fix_command: Set explicit model on all agents in openclaw.json. Run: jq .agents.list[].id ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json

checks.name: gemma4:31b-cloud in globalAllowedModels
checks.fix_command: Update model-policy.json: add ollama/gemma4:31b-cloud to globalAllowedModels
checks.rationale: CHG-0356: gemma4:31b-cloud approved as T2 Ollama Cloud model. Now primary for defaults + governance agents during interim.
